rulings.Rulings: The motion is granted with respect to a possible debtor¿s examination, but otherwise denied. No sanctions. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, March 14, 2012.
